titleStmt.title: SII 38.534: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 534. (A.R. No. 534 of 1912.) TIRUNĪRMALAI, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPET DISTRICT. On the east wall, Nīrvaṇṇar shrine, Raṅganātha perumāḷ temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachchakkravartti Rājarāja (III) Year 16, 40th day, 1232 A.D.

summary.p: Incomplete. Registers a gift of ten vēli of land in two pieces as tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam (including all the taxes) for providing food offerings and for maintaining perpetual lamps during the midnight (?) service called Tiruvāḻipparappināṉ-sandhi in the temple of Tirunīrmalai Emberumāṉ by Madurāntakap-pottappichchōḻaṉ Gaṇḍagōpālaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājarā[ja]
tevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 6vatu nāḷ 4 10 mutal maturānta
kap pottappiccoḻaṉ kaṇṭakopālan tirunīrma
lai Emperumāṉukku tiruva cāmanMay be read as tiruvattacāmamtiruvāḻiparappi nā
n canti Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭiyun tirunantāviḷakkum
celvatāka kuṉṟattūr perumataku kālappokkil kaḻa
ṉi 5 10 6 matuṟu muṭipāttu Ellai cerakkuḷavāy kaṇṇāṟu
5 10 4m Āka nilam pattuveliyum tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāka
Aṉaittāyaṅkaḷum vuṭpaṭa viṭṭatu Innilaṅkoṇṭu
Iccanti cantirātittavarai celuttuvate
Digital edition of SII 38.534 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
